heading: Treatment services for pregnant women
label: 300x–27 Treatment services for pregnant women
notes: Prior ProvisionsA prior section 1927 of act , was classified to prior to repeal by .July 1, 1944section 300x–12 of this titlePub. L. 102–321Another prior section 1927 of act , was classified to prior to repeal by .July 1, 1944section 300y–6 of this titlePub. L. 99–280

amendments: Amendments1992—Subsec. (b)(2)(B). struck out “available” before “interim services available”.Pub. L. 102–352

Effective Date of 1992 AmendmentAmendment by effective immediately upon effectuation of amendment made by , see , set out as a note under .Pub. L. 102–352Pub. L. 102–321section 3(1) of Pub. L. 102–352section 285n of this title

children.text: will ensure that each pregnant woman in the State who seeks or is referred for and would benefit from such services is given preference in admissions to treatment facilities receiving funds pursuant to the grant; and
will, in carrying out paragraph (1), publicize the availability to such women of services from the facilities and the fact that the women receive such preference.

the State involved will require that, in the event that a treatment facility has insufficient capacity to provide treatment services to any woman described in such subsection who seeks the services from the facility, the facility refer the woman to the State; and

children.label: A
children.text: will refer the woman to a treatment facility that has the capacity to provide treatment services to the woman; or

children.label: B
children.text: will, if no treatment facility has the capacity to admit the woman, make interim services available to the woman not later than 48 hours after the women seeks the treatment services.1So in original. Probably should be “woman”.1
